release_notes: VISIBLE TEST UPDATE: top badge now says BETA 2.3.1 • BUILD 231
Feature tabs moved into a cleaner Categories bar under the header
Added right-side arrow for Detailed 7-Day weather
Bottom forecast cards act like glass tabs and open daily details
This update is only for testing KDrive update detection and install flow
message: DynamicWeather Beta 2.3.1 UI test update is available.
